message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state after analysis/TUI/export enhancements

Captures issue state changes from the development session that produced
the analysis engine expansion, robot envelope consolidation, TUI heatmap,
and SQLite export features. 34 new history snapshots track the
incremental issue state transitions during this work.
